title: Trintion Cellophane Wrap 100m x 80cm Clear Cellophane Roll Durable Cellophane Gift Wrapping Roll for Hampers Flowers Crafts Baskets for Valentine Birthday Festival
features: [Crystal Clear Design] This crystal clear cellophane-wrapped gift basket decoration adds beauty to gifts, makes your gift bag look more lovely, and shows your heart.

[Durable Material] The transparent cellophane roll is made of PP (polypropylene) material, which has high-quality comprehensive performance, strong stability, safety, and environmental protection, and is very durable.

[Cutable Size] Flower shop packaging cellophane is 100m long and 80cm wide. The clear wrapping paper for hamper can be cut to the desired length according to the size of the package, and the large and small items can be easily wrapped.
[Easy To Use] Gift wrapping paper can be used to wrap gifts in any shape. You can cut the desired size to make the gift wrap beautifully.

[Very Versatile] Transparent cellophane rolls are perfect for any occasion and make gifts beautiful. It can pack anything, chocolates, bouquets, fruit baskets, gift baskets, wine bottles, birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, treats, and more.
description: Product Description Mateiral Our cellophane wrap rolls are tough, wear-resistant, and not easy to damage. Material: Waterproof polypropylene flower wrap Specification The 2.3 Mil thickness is great for keeping moisture and dirt out. Keep your food and treats fresh and clean. Crystal Clear Our Gift Wrappings are extra clear and glossy. It provides a very professional vibe and is great for packaging artwork and gifts. Easy to Use Firstly, unfold the cellophane roll, cut it to the length you need, then wrap the product you need to wrap in it, and tie the drawstring, so you can get a nice wrapping.Tough, wear-resistant, not easy to be damaged. Dust-proof, high transparency, clean, waterproof, very good styling. Application It is great for keeping moisture and dirt out. Also keeping your food and treats fresh and clean.Cellophane cover is perfect to make small hampers, wrap gift box, homemade soap, flowers, cookies, treats, candy, picture frames, wine bottles, flower arrangements, arts & crafts, toys, etc.
